query: OK... we just implemented issue 437 fix.  Now, we need to identify the records in our knowledge database and actually quarantine them.  This must be done manually, because quarantine is the only action that removes these entities from the HNSW search, which is part of the desired outcome.  These entries are telemetry, not knowledge.  1. Search unimatrix for the presence of this telemetry type entries, and identify the best way to filter for ONLY these entities.  Get a list of all of them (in batches if necessary).  Stop to review with human... The next step is quarantine after human approves.

entries.title: GRAPH_EDGES compaction DELETE must filter quarantined entries by status, not just existence
co_access promotion SELECT missing quarantine-status filter causes compaction/promotion oscillation
ADR-001 bugfix-458: GRAPH_EDGES compaction must filter on status != 3 (quarantined), not just entry existence
Status-transition handlers must conditionally re-insert into VectorIndex when restoring an entry
